title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 407.910 - Violations — punitive damage and costs authorized
text:
407.910.  Violations — punitive damage and costs authorized. — Any art dealer or creditor of an art dealer who violates any provision of sections 407.900 to 407.910 with intent to injure shall, in addition to the payment of all other damages and costs owed by him, pay to the artist involved punitive damages in an amount as may be determined by law and reasonable attorney's fees.
(L. 1984 S.B. 688 § 7)
